title: calystegia macrostegia
intro: Calystegia macrostegia, commonly known as Island Morning Glory or Purple Island Morning Glory, is a species of flowering plant in the Convolvulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and infections. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Calystegia macrostegia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
